<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get player's network by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/user/players/{id}/network"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the followers and following list of a specific player.

  as={"h2"}
